calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Continued To Dec-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to DEC-11-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. The Court intends to dismiss the case if there is no appearance at the next hearing or compliance. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
